---
title: "Project Title"
description: "One-line description of what this project does"
date: 2026-01-01
categories: [IBD, tool, Python]
---

::: {.project-card}
[Live]{.project-status .live}
<!-- Status options: [Live]{.project-status .live} / [Active]{.project-status .active} / [Planned]{.project-status .planned} -->

## Problem

What clinical or research gap does this address? Why does it matter? Keep it to 2–3 sentences that a non-specialist could follow.

## Approach

How does it work? Describe the architecture, key design decisions, and why you chose this path over alternatives.

## Key details

- **Stack**: Python, Streamlit, PyTorch, etc.
- **Data**: What it trains on or processes
- **Evaluation**: Metrics, validation approach

## Status

Where things stand right now. What's deployed, what's in progress, what's next.

## Links

- [Live app](https://example.com)
- [Source code](https://github.com/MahshadSa/repo-name)
- [Related note](/notes/concepts/related-concept.qmd)

:::
